specific_language: first dedicated agroecology vehicle in the region
suggested_outreach: Request a briefing with the Mekong facility design team before the second-tranche design phase and offer Forum's system-finance frame as input.

signal_headline: Aquaspark closes $280m Fund III with SEA aquaculture mandate
specific_language: deliberate tilt toward smallholder-clustered supply models and away from vertically integrated industrial farms
suggested_outreach: Deepen existing Visionary relationship by co-hosting a peer session on cooperative-scale aquaculture investment.

signal_headline: AVPN launches Asia Agroecology Funders Collaborative
specific_language: move beyond project-by-project funding and toward system finance for cooperative and smallholder-centred infrastructure
suggested_outreach: Offer Forum as knowledge partner to the collaborative's first convening; propose a joint framing paper on smallholder-centred finance.

signal_headline: FAIRR publishes 2026 Coller Protein Producer Index with SEA focus
specific_language: prompt investor re-engagement on transition lock-in
suggested_outreach: Align on shared narrative ahead of FAIRR's next investor day; explore a co-authored SEA-specific transition lock-in note.

signal_headline: DBS signals reduced appetite for industrial livestock financing in SEA
specific_language: reduce lending exposure to large-scale industrial livestock operations over the next 36 months
suggested_outreach: Request a meeting with the DBS sustainability team to brief on destination capital needed for cooperative-scale regenerative alternatives.

signal_headline: UOB launches cooperative-tier agricultural lending product
specific_language: system finance available at a level where it has historically been scarce
suggested_outreach: Introduce the UOB product team to two Forum-network cooperatives currently evaluating lender options; offer case-study input for the next product iteration.

signal_headline: Wilmar publishes first agroecology transition roadmap
specific_language: using the word agroecology rather than the group's prior sustainable agriculture framing
suggested_outreach: Request a technical briefing on the roadmap's smallholder-equity targets and probe willingness to publish cooperative-origin volume data.

signal_headline: Olam Group expands Thai rice sourcing under regenerative contract terms
specific_language: soil-health measurement and water-use thresholds to procurement criteria
suggested_outreach: Cold outreach via the sustainability lead; focus on whether regenerative contracts can extend explicitly to cooperative-origin procurement tiers.

signal_headline: Unilever SEA raises cooperative-sourced spice share to 28 per cent
specific_language: 28 per cent of its regional spice volumes now originate from registered farmer cooperatives
suggested_outreach: Low priority — monitor only; reassess if cooperative share passes 35 per cent within 12 months.

signal_headline: Temasek takes minority stake in regional alternative-protein holding company
suggested_outreach: Watch only — signal runs counter to Forum thesis; no active outreach recommended at this stage.
